description: Letter from Shelomo b. Nissim ha-Levi al-Barki, from Alexandria, to Musa b. Abi al-Hayy, Fustat. Around 1080. The writer writes to his brother in law, his sister’s husband. Regarding several services he did for his brother in law: purchasing of wheat and collecting rent for hoses Musa has in Alexandria. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #645) VMR
description_he: מכתב משלמה בן ניסים הלוי אל-ברקי, אלכסנדריה, למוסא בן אבי אל-חי, פוסטאט, כ-1080, על קניית חיטה וגביית שכר דירה
